import React from 'react' import { Outlet, NavLink, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom' import { useAuth } from '../../hooks/useAuth' const IconGrid = () => const IconCalendar = () => const IconUsers = () => const IconFileText = () => const IconCard = () => const IconLogout = () => const IconBrain = () => export default function Layout() { const { perfil, logout } = useAuth() const navigate = useNavigate() const initiales = perfil ? `${(perfil.nombre || 'U')[0]}${(perfil.apellido || '')[0] || ''}`.toUpperCase() : 'U' const handleLogout = async () => { await logout() navigate('/login') } return (
